array.string: cd "$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon" || exit 1; source .venv/bin/activate || exit 1; export PYTHONPATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon"; export DB_PATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon/data/openclaw_real.db"; set -a; if [ -f env/telegram_daemon.env ]; then source env/telegram_daemon.env; elif [ -f env/telegram.env ]; then source env/telegram.env; fi; set +a; exec "$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon/scripts/spec_reply_loop.sh"
